_note: Single source of truth for all numeric claims used across multiple documents. Update values HERE; run scripts/sync_canonical_numbers.py to propagate. Agents must never hand-edit README.md / PR_DESCRIPTION.md / BACKEND_EVIDENCE.md numbers directly — always update this file first.

connectblock.wording: ConnectBlock aggregate block validation is 2.6–5.4% slower than libsecp256k1 depending on transaction mix.

taproot_signing.wording: Taproot key-path signing is 22–24% faster than libsecp256k1.

ct_signing_clang19.wording: CT signing: Clang 19 = 1.20–1.33× faster than libsecp256k1.
